rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.30+commit.73712a01"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"SumcheckVerifier","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Verifier for the sumcheck protocol over GF(2^128).   The sumcheck protocol reduces a claim about a multivariate sum:     S = \u03a3_{x \u2208 {0,1}^n} g(x)   to a single evaluation claim g(r\u2081,...,r\u2099) = v at a random point.   The protocol runs in n rounds. In round i, the prover sends a   univariate polynomial g\u1d62(X\u1d62) of degree \u2264 d. The verifier checks:     g\u1d62(0) + g\u1d62(1) = claimed_sum   then samples a random challenge r\u1d62 and sets:     claimed_sum_{i+1} = g\u1d62(r\u1d62)   After n rounds, the verifier holds r = (r\u2081,...,r\u2099) and the final   claimed value g(r) which is checked against an oracle/PCS opening.   In Binius64, the sumcheck polynomials have degree \u2264 3 (for AND   constraints) and the field is GF(2^128).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/SumcheckVerifier.sol":"SumcheckVerifier"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":10000},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/BinaryFieldLib.sol":{"keccak256":"0x357b9a1e25083685c2bc358ea577fa47c1db162d61e9ce452aece99916844466","license":"Apache-2.0 OR MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ecd6dd3e0bd9521c4c178fbed7b9156c2d193a4e963b54d710d9ac1ea431c011","dweb:/ipfs/QmcLydmRLakKumDqQPtXsuGCe3Go7P1PJ3sBwJzzyCU7sr"]},"src/FiatShamirTranscript.sol":{"keccak256":"0x13bb517b028740004df5429a6e590dd2f84a947137e5c5c64b185a2890feaf99","license":"Apache-2.0 OR MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d0cf1c75c251b243ee5f3bfeb57002513d2b4ec2d1910fc8b53421563a039d50","dweb:/ipfs/QmRD4XdWv9PLvw26dkgQhxuwZSibcpURuMU6jDBVoFJgZs"]},"src/SumcheckVerifier.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9fc1f8ca2a8a33e938ddcf874d1d969d8b4f8748677b6a0cc65ad50c218cdd30","license":"Apache-2.0 OR MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c37cec98d8cb833e46447cf94cd256e67cd0d52e7807c7bb7c28e224a5dd7a2f","dweb:/ipfs/Qmegni6Liu6ittxMz523KF1XhiwQPFFd9p39gSE8gMLmX7"]}},"version":1}
